programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes Caesar pay for his crimes against the children, and Smoker risks his life for a chance to see Vergo fall in battle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law reaches the end of his epic battle with Vergo, and Luffy looks to land a devastating final blow on the murderous gasbag Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Word of Luffy and Law's alliance spreads throughout the world, Chopper and Brook race to stay ahead of the deadly gas, and Joker sends a team to rescue Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The laboratory crumbling around them, and time running out, Luffy, the Straw Hats, the G-5, the children and all the others make a final desperate sprint towards the one exit left off the island - but Joker has one more trick up his sleeve.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Straw Hats and company flee the crumbling laboratory, Caesar's desperate act of vengeance thwarts Joker's plan to forever silence his enemies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky continues his battle with Buffalo and Baby 5, Nami uses a mighty gust of wind to save the children from a deadly cloud of gas, and Usopp takes a shot at capturing Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A dragon regains his boyish form, a noble warrior once feared dead makes a shocking resurrection, and bitter enemies set aside their differences to enjoy a well-deserved feast!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The weary marines and the rescued children get teary-eyed as they say goodbye to the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Law enters into treacherous negotiations with Joker!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On their way after having set out from Punk Hazard, the Straw Hats find out their next destination - just as a huge wave comes crashing down on the Sunny! But it's rough sailing for the G-5 as well, as Donflamingo arrives on the scene and wreaks havoc!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Aokiji's intercession saves Smoker and sends Joker off to rethink his strategy, leaving unanswered questions about Aokiji's current status. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats catch their breath as the Sunny makes its way through the rough seas of the New World.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Smooth seas stretch out before the Straw Hats as they leave Punk Hazard far behind -- but while they fear Donflamingo's return and prepare to face him, another foe lies in wait, whose powers could be their downfall!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Breed has Luffy, Trafalgar, and Chopper firmly in his grasp with his Peto-Peto power! Breed dreams of a world in which he has enslaved all the humans, but Luffy's stubborn persistence and unwillingness to cooperate may have landed him in hot water.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy meets an unexpected acquaintance from the past, Bellamy, who seems to be up to no good! Meanwhile, Caesar Handover Team encounters a snag when they learn just how dangerous Green Bit is!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡En la quinta ronda de la Liga Pokémon, Ash y Richie se enfrentan uno al otro! ¿Sobrevivirá su amistad esta importante batalla?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Brock están en las gradas vitoreando a Richie cuando la Liga Pokémon llega a su fin y marchan juntos en las ceremonias de clausura. ¡Es una experiencia que acompañará a Ash durante todo su viaje como Entrenador!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos regresan a Pueblo Paleta con una gran bienvenida, ¡sólo para ser enviados a otro viaje de inmediato! El Profesor Oak busca una misteriosa Pokébola, y le pide a Ash, Brock y Misty que la encuentren para él.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Los chicos deben viajar a la Isla Valencia para traer una misteriosa Pokébola para el Profesor Oak. Cuando Ash gana un viaje gratis en dirigible, parece que sus penurias terminaron, pero, ¿quién pilotea esta cosa?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras un aterrizaje forzoso en la Isla Valencia, los chicos van al laboratorio de la Profesora Ivy, donde está la misteriosa Pokébola. Brock se asombra al descubrir que la profesora y sus colegas también son criadores Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Gracias a la canción de Jigglypuff, el dirigible de Ash y Misty da vuelta a casa, se sale de curso y se estrella en una isla, donde conocen a un nuevo amigo llamado Tracey mientras intenta ayudar a un Lapras perdido.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a explorar las Islas Naranja, ¡y Ash está decidido a calificar en la Liga Naranja! Pronto descubre que los desafíos del Equipo Naranja son un poco diferentes a las batallas de otros gimnasios.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash, Misty y Tracey llegan a la Isla Mandarina, Pikachu y Togepi se rebelan y se unen a unos Pokémon furiosos. Cuando los Pokémon desaparecen, la Oficial Jenny les habla de la desaparición de docenas de Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash encuentra un mensaje en una botella, el cual lleva a nuestros héroes a una nueva aventura en la Isla Sunburst, y a la búsqueda de un Onix muy especial.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes se encuentran en la Isla Pinkan, hogar de un gran número de Pokémon de colores extraños. Ash y Tracey quedan fascinados con estos Pokémon rosas… ¡al igual que el Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras unirse a una expedición científica para investigar el fósil de un Kabuto, Ash y sus amigos pronto se encuentran enfrentando una serie de desastres naturales.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Otro especialista en los Pokémon tipo Agua reta a Misty a una batalla y le ofrece un consejo: ¡él cree que el Psyduck de Misty está listo para evolucionar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a una muy ocupada Enfermera Joy quien debe saltar por toda la isla para cuidar de todos los Pokémon del área. ¿Podrán ayudar a protegerla del Equipo Rocket?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: En el segundo reto de Ash contra el Equipo Naranja, él debe escalar una montaña, construir un trineo y ganar una carrera de trineos. ¿Sus Pokémon tienen lo necesario para superar estos obstáculos?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: La exploración de nuestros héroes los lleva a las Islas Toronja, ¡donde se enteran de que la famosa fruta de la isla ha estado desapareciendo! Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a atrapar a quien sea responsable.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Cuando los buzos recuperan un antiguo trofeo de Campeonato de la Liga Naranja, nuestros héroes van directo al museo de arte donde se exhibe para verlo! Desafortunadamente, el Equipo Rocket ya se les adelantó…

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: El Equipo Rocket se estrella en una isla y Meowth es el centro de atención pues lo confunden con el "Gran Meowth Pródigo", una poderosa criatura de la cual habla una profecía. ¿Qué sucederá cuando descubran la verdad?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Misty no está contenta cuando nuestros héroes aterrizan en una isla llena de Pokémon tipo Insecto, aunque Ash y Tracey la pasan muy bien. Cuando encuentran a un Scyther herido, ¿podrá Misty superar su disgusto y ayudarlo?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash y sus amigos encuentran una maravillosa isla repleta de muchos tipos de árboles frutales, deciden tomarse un descanso y disfrutar su botín. Claro que el Equipo Rocket tiene otra idea…

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a un par de Entrenadores que no parecen llevarse nada bien, aunque sus Nidoran están obviamente encantados uno con el otro. ¡Misty está decidida a resolver este desafío romántico!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras caminar bajo una tormenta eléctrica, nuestros héroes encuentran a un grupo de Magnemite absorbiendo electricidad de los rayos. Cuando llegan al pueblo para descansar, hay un apagón. ¿Podrán ayudarlos los Magnemite?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: En Ciudad Trovitopolis, Ash y sus amigos escuchan sobre una cierta clase de monstruo que ha estado asustando a todos, y cuando el suelo se resquebraja y los lanza a las cloacas, parece que conocerán al monstruo cara a cara.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Luego de que Misty bucea hacia un remolino para rescatar a una chica, descubre que el hermano de esta, Rudy, está enamorado de ella. Las cosas se complican pues él también es el Líder de Gimnasio al que Ash retará después.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos van en busca de un Pokémon de gran tamaño, pero cuando caen ante un truco del Equipo Rocket, y luego Pikachu y Meowth son secuestrados por un Pidgeot gigante, ¡todos deben trabajar juntos para recuperarlos!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Luego de escuchar hablar de Ash por el Líder de Gimnasio de Isla Trovita, otro Entrenador lo busca para una batalla… y, tras ver derrotado a Pïkachu, Ash utiliza a Charizard. Pero ¿logrará que el Pokémon rebelde lo escuche?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Los planes de nuestros héroes se ven interrumpidos por un incendio devastador en una casa cercana. Cuando intentan combatir las llamas, pronto requieren al departamento de bomberos local: ¡el Equipo Wartortle!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando la Pokébola de Snorlax se rompe, Ash tiene un gran problema en sus manos, ¿cómo lograrán nuestros héroes que el somnoliento Snorlax sobre una montaña llegue al Centro Pokémon más cercano?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash está ansioso por ganar la última medalla de la Liga Naranja, ¡y pronto prueba un poco de la fuerza de esta Líder de Gimnasio cuando ella le ayuda a eludir otro sigiloso ataque del Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras descubrir el submarino de un científico, los chicos se ven rodeados de la investigación de sus vidas: un banco de Magikarp. Quieren ayudarlo a estudiar la evolución de los Magikarp, pero el Equipo Rocket tiene otra idea.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Con Ash y Tracey paralizados por el Paralizador de un Vileplume salvaje, ¡depende de Misty encontrar una planta local y salvar a todos!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Starship Invasions

programme.title: RiffTrax: Star Games

programme.title: RiffTrax: Killers From Space

programme.title: Live: Plan 9 From Outer Space

programme.title: RiffTrax: Attack From Space
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 60s sci-fi classic! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax.

programme.title: Attack Of The Supermonsters
programme.desc: When stop-motion dinosaurs meet anime superheroes, only one thing is certain: things are about to get dumb as hell! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for one of the most unique movies we've ever done, Attack of the Super Monsters!

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan descubre el juego de Julieta con su hermano. Paula aprovecha el momento para presionar al hombre que ama, sin imaginar que José está allí para enfrentarla. Las amantes de Emilio siguen sufriendo por sus pecados en el pasado.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia niega que Alejandro sea hijo de Aníbal Villegas. David escucha toda la conversación. Verónica le dice a Julio que tiene pruebas contra él. Alejandro le reclama a Antonia el haber acabado con su vida; para él es la peor madre que pudo tener.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le regresa el niño a Lucecita. Alejandro va a la tumba de Gabriela y Verónica lo escucha decir cuánto todavía la extraña y la ama. Ella siente nostalgia. Antonia está tensa y ordena la muerte de Julio, que ya sabe que Gabriela está viva.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Julio repite el nombre de Gabriela Suárez mientras agoniza, pero no alcanza a decir que ella es Verónica Dantés. Antonia se va quedando cada vez más sola y Poncia se lo hace notar. Alejandro sabe que su mamá no siente nada por la muerte de Montemar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams battle the scorching heat while transporting shrimp baskets for one mile to a local fisherman, and one Racer approaches their breaking point during the exhausting Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Seoul, South Korea to clinch a spot in the finale and a chance to race for the one million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the one million dollar prize on the line, the final three teams race to Chicago where they must complete their final challenges within the city's most iconic landmarks, including a trip to Wrigley Field, the home of the World Champion Chicago Cubs.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: 11 of the most competitive teams in Amazing Race history take on the ultimate challenge for a shot at a Million Dollars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers Dangle from amazing heights to retrieve their first clue in Antwerp Belgium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Things get slimy at a fishy challenge in Tangiers. Morocco.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: How will a pair of Indy Car racers handle a self-drive in Saint-Tropez, France?

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The stakes are high as teams face the Double U-Turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers swap teammates for an entire leg for the first time ever in Amazing Race history!

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Will one team's game be on the line when they misplace their passport?

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Things get hairy for teams in Hong Kong when tasked with wrangling fifty hairy crabs in the pouring rain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After being foreman of a jury that convicted an Apache, Lucas is marked for death. Now, he must discover who is behind the curse.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two pranksters write away for a mail-order bride, using Lucas's name.

programme.desc: Lucas recognizes Dr. Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once fought. He helps with a dying man, but Lucas and the doctor have unresolved anger.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Chinese man and his son fight prejudice as they try to open a laundry in North Fork.

programme.desc: Mark takes a job as a stable boy against his father's wishes.

programme.desc: Mark and Milly are held hostage in her general store when two gunmen attempt a daring robbery.

programme.desc: Two prison wagon drivers stop at the McCain ranch looking for whiskey. Lucas turns them down because they are escorting a murderer, to be hanged in Yuma.

programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin reinstall cabinets that survived the fire. Tom teaches apprentices to trim a window. HVAC contractor James shows Richard the plan for hot water. Carol and her sister shop for appliances.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices attend a roofing class and then put their skills to practice. Back at the triple decker, a vinyl floor goes in. Mauro touches up the cabinets. Tom and Charlie install French doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Well over a year and a half since the fire, the triple decker is just about ready for the homeowners to return. Kevin O'Connor checks out what's left to do in all three units, both inside and out.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Illegal fireworks caused a fire in the Dorchester triple decker. Charlie Silva along with local contractors put this house back together. After a long wait, Carol and family can now move back home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Follow the renovation of an 1887 dark, divided two-family home to a bright, open Scandinavian-style one-family, all in a one-episode summer special.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The number of people entering the building trades is declining. This Old House launched the Generation Next initiative to encourage young people to consider the trades as a viable profession.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin, Richard, and Tom follow a family on their journey to restore an abandoned house in Detroit. The city has a program to bring these empty houses back to life, revitalizing the neighborhoods.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: On November 8, 2018 the residents of Paradise woke to a wildfire that would burn many homes and take lives. This Old House follows three families on their emotional ride as they rebuild their homes.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: This 1880 Country Cape started as a small house on a large piece of land but was added onto over time. The crew meets the homeowners and tours both inside and outside to learn about the plans.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Appliances and radiators are salvaged before the major demolition begins. Outside, an arborist sprays the Hemlock trees to protect from damaging insects. Time to cut off the garage addition.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old foundation gets modified for the new basement. Jenn meets with the landscape designer to discuss the plans for the front yard. On the first floor, Charlie and Tom install a recessed beam.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The foundation is waterproofed. Exterior paint colors are discussed. Homeowner Megan lends a hand turning the new newel posts. Cape style homes are discussed. The foundation is braced for backfilling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old foundation is transitioned to the new. Natural stone is cut into veneers. A new beam is installed on the back dormer for more headroom. Homeowner Megan and her interior designer look at tile.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A Flitch beam is installed. Tree maintenance is performed. A new footing is poured under the kitchen chimney. Sheathing systems are explored. Kevin tours a high-tech sheathing factory in Georgia.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A block wall is constructed to accept the addition framing. The old floor joists are shimmed to make a smooth transition to the new part of the house. The kitchen designer lays out the kitchen.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A bay window is removed and reframed for a new. An old school is being restored into apartments for veterans. The underside of a deck is the "roof" of living space below. Pipe locations are discussed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An exterior wall is framed on ground and raised into place. A history of framing tools is given. Recessed lighting and electrical panels are discussed. An old ridge beam is replaced with three LVLs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy discusses the use of I-joists and LVL beams. Kevin meets woodworker Paul Grouthouse. Kevin and Charlie insulate the original dormers. Landscape designer shares her intentions for the front yard.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The multi-angled roof has been framed. A remote-controlled skylight is installed. Mini duct system is discussed. The homeowner's mother makes a glass mosaic table. Rotted wood gutter is replaced.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: New material is used for the house's exterior trim. Kevin visits a window restoration shop. Radiant floor heating is installed in the garage. The homeowners tile the basement bathroom.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The roof gets different types of underlayment. An oak mantle is installed. Brickwork is corrected. The old boiler is disassembled. Exterior clapboards are painted inside. A linear drain is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A composite deck is installed. The basement gets insulated. Unconventional HVAC zoning is discussed. Kevin tours a stove factory in Reading, PA. Solar panels and their backup system are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The master bathroom gets a plaster treatment. Windowsills are replicated in Dracut, MA. A kitchen garden, recessed lighting, and floating countertop are installed. New wood floors change directions.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1880s Country Cape is finished. The cast arrives and reflects on the changes that have been made since Charlie's crew started work. The homeowners take Kevin and Tommy on a tour of the house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: It's a new project. We meet a new builder Deliandro and homeowners Robyn and Derek in the West Roxbury section of Boston. Robyn gives a tour. Derek is an architect and drew the construction plans.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The inside is demo'ed. Beams are installed to replace a load-bearing wall. A willow is pruned, and house wrap is installed. The homeowners select kitchen cabinets. A wider window opening is created.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Outside, windows are trimmed with PVC, and the house gets sided with fiber cement clapboards. An American Elm resistant to Dutch Elm disease is planted. Inside, a drainpipe puzzle is solved.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: By the time an innocent story is retold through several people, the trio believes Bob and Carol's marriage is on the rocks. Larry and Terri try to straighten things out with the couple - only to be "caught" by Mr. Furley.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When the Bistro's building inspector demands a bribe from Jack, Janet suggests that they tape the next conversation for evidence. The recording the police hear, however, is of Furley telling Jack he has the pot (terrain) he wanted.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is making plans for her wedding to a soap opera star - until Jack discovers that his sleazy reputation is well-earned.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack challenges a guy who has insulted Furley to a boxing match. His opponent, the girls learn, is a Golden Glove contender with 22 knockouts.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Furley helps Jack lose his "I can stay away for a week" bet with the girls.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Terri believe that Janet is trying to seduce Furley's shy nephew.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Instead of catching sleep in the dingy apartment above his restaurant, Jack catches Mr. Angelino with a young woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri falls for Jack when he buys a mustache which makes him look like her old boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A former cook in the Navy with Jack comes to town to con his way into a partnership in Jack's Bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls fake a contest to give Jack the rent money he needs for Jack's Bistro. Their good deed turns to disaster when Jack spends the money on a leather coat.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Pedro Campa
programme.desc: On August 13th, 2022, Teofimo Lopez fought Pedro Campa for the NABF & WBO International Super Lightweight Titles in Las Vegas. Teofimo looked confident and quick from the start, wearing down Campa until he finally stopped him in the 7th round.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Vasiliy Lomachenko
programme.desc: On October 17th, 2020 Teofimo Lopez and Vasiliy Lomachenko battled for IBF, WBA and WBO World Lightweight title in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout that ended in victory for Lopez.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs William Silva
programme.desc: On July 14th, 2018 Teofimo Lopez and William Silva fought for the vacant WBC Continental Americas lightweight titles with Silva going down 3 times Lopez secured the technical knockout win in the sixth round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Andre Gorges
programme.desc: On April 14th, 2012 Terence Crawford fought Andre Gorges at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas in a bout that was set for 6 round and lasted 5 with a win by knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Jose Benavidez Jr
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2018, Terence Crawford fought Jose Benavidez Jr for the WBO World Welterweight Title in Omaha, Nebraska. In a dominant performance, Crawford showed out in front of his hometown, delivering a TKO in the final round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Julius Indongo
programme.desc: On August 19th, 2017 Terence Crawford fought Julius Indongo for the IBF, WBA, WBC and WBO World Super Lightweight titles at the Pinnacle Bank Arena in Lincoln the bout ended in the third round by knockout securing the victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Kell Brook
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2020 Terence Crawford battled Kell Brook for the WBO World Welterweight title in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a fourth round technical knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Shawn Porter
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Terence Crawford fought Shawn Porter for the WBO World Welterweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In a very close fight, Crawford turned it up and put on the pressure late, delivering a TKO in the 10th round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Thomas Dulorme
programme.desc: On April 18th, 2015, Terence Crawford fought Thomas Dulorme for the WBO World Super Lightweight Title in Arlington, Texas. Putting on the pressure and showing his aggressive style, Crawford scored three knockdowns in the sixth round to get the TKO.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Viktor Postol
programme.desc: On July 23rd, 2016, Terence Crawford fought Viktor Postol for the WBO and WBC World Super Lightweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Scoring two knockdowns, Crawford dominated the fight, earning a much deserved unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Yuriorkis Gamboa
programme.desc: On June 28th, 2014, Terence Crawford fought Yuriorkis Gamboa for the WBO Lightweight Title at Century Link Center in Omaha. In Top Rank's 2014 Fight of the Year, Terence Crawford shined in front of his hometown, stopping Gamboa in the ninth round.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Juan Domingo Roldan
programme.desc: On October 29th, 1987 Thomas Hearns faced Juan Domingo Roldan for the vacant WBC World Middleweight title at the Las Vegas Hilton the 12 round bout went only 4 rounds ending with a knockout by Hearns securing the victory.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Roberto Duran
programme.desc: On June 15th, 1984 Thomas Hearns fought Roberto Duran for WBC World Super Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that resulted in a technical knockout victory in the second round by Hearns.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Kendall Holt
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2009, Timothy Bradley Jr fought Kendall Holt for the WBC and WBO Light Welterweight Titles at the Bell Centre in Montreal. Holt scored two knockdowns to keep the fight close, but Bradley stayed aggressive enough to earn the decision.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Ruslan Provodnikov
programme.desc: On March 16th, 2013, Timothy Bradley fought Ruslan Provodnikov for the WBO Welterweight Title in Carson, California. Provodnikov put up a very strong challenge in an incredible fight, but Bradley prevailed, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley vs Manny Pacquiao I
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2012 Manny Pacquiao and Timothy Bradley started their trilogy at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a battle for the WBO World Welterweight title that ended in a split decision win for Timothy Bradley.

programme.title: Todd Foster vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On August 6th, 1992 Todd Foster fought Jeff Mayweather at Denton Field in Miles City with Mayweather going down in rounds 7 & 8 the bout resulted in a technical knockout victory for Foster.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost the trust of Timaeus, Yugi can no longer use his guardian dragon against Weevil's insect invasion. Discouraged and confused, Yugi has lost his dueling instincts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is on a vision quest where he must travel through a past of evil to find and conquer his greatest foe... himself.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is in no shape to duel... but Dartz doesn't care! Dartz sends out his ancient annihilator Orichalcos Soldier to finish Yugi once and for all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Valon is ready to take on the world and fight... for the heart of Mai? And the first adversaries standing in his way are Duke and Rebecca!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a duel thirty thousand feet in the air as Alister squares off against Kaiba on top of an airplane.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Alister dispatches his airborne arsenal Air Fortress Ziggurat! How can Kaiba defeat a monster the size of the plane itself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz has taken over KaibaCorp! Can Kaiba, with Yugi's help, break into his own company which he's protected with the latest in security technology?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With chaos running rampant, Valon separates Joey from his friends for a final showdown with Mai's heart on the line.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Decked out in high-tech body armor and weapons, Valon pummels Joey with punishing punches. Can Joey outthink the computer before it's too late?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Valon's battle rages to its climax as Joey attempts to turn the duel around by augmenting the same armor that Valon used against him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Broken and battered after his exhausting battle against Valon, Joey can barely stand up, much less duel. However, he faces a fresh and determined Mai.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a rematch between the Pharaoh and Rafael - but this time, the Pharaoh doesn't have Yugi to protect him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rafael appears to be creating an opening for the Pharaoh's counterattack, but Rafael has even more dreadful displays of terror in mind.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rafael calls forth Guardian Dreadscythe, a ravaging reaper that can never be defeated.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After discovering the location of Dartz's secret base, our heroes are on their way to stop Dartz once and for all. Can they reach Dartz before he resurrects the lethal Grand Dragon Leviathan from its millennial slumber?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz's secrets are finally revealed! As the answers to the most puzzling questions are exposed, the Pharaoh and Kaiba realize how much is at stake.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz plants the souls of our captured heroes into Mirror Knights to use them as puppets to fight the Pharaoh and Kaiba.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz summons the thundering Orichalcos Shunoros to pound the Pharaoh and Kaiba into pancakes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's soul has been captured, leaving the Pharaoh all alone to fend for himself against the invincible forces of Dartz and the Orichalcos! Will his friends reach out from the beyond to give him one last fighting chance?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grand Dragon Leviathan's thunderous roars unleash hundred-foot tall waves worldwide! How can Yugi stop the annihilation of the planet?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is trapped inside the Duel Dome, and the only way to escape is by defeating the Duel Computer, programmed with the skills of the world's top duelists. Since the Duel Computer has access to thousands of cards, how can Yugi win?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Goes Platinum Pt. 2
programme.desc: Tori gets to sing at a big music awards show, but the producer wants to totally change her look and behavior. Tori agrees, but finds that she doesn't like her new image.

programme.title: Victorious: Cell Block

programme.title: Victorious: Three Girls And A Moose
programme.desc: Tori, Cat, and Jade compete with each other to win the affection of Beck's big, handsome, hockey-loving Canadian friend, Moose.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Fixes Beck & Jade
programme.desc: Beck wants to ask a girl out but is worried about Jade's reaction, so Tori and Andre attempt to get Jade a date to even the playing field. Robbie works to remove a butterfly stuck in Cat's ear.

programme.title: Victorious: Robbie Sells Rex
programme.desc: Mason Thornesmith's bratty 12-year-old kid wants to buy Rex from Robbie. Meanwhile, a masked flour thrower is on the loose in Hollywood Arts.

programme.title: Victorious: The Bad Roommate
programme.desc: Andre stays with Tori to work on a song for class. They quickly find they aren't the best roommates. Jade discovers an unflattering picture of herself on the internet, and conspires to take it down.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When their friend Gibby is too shy to ask out the girl he likes, the gang decides to make him and his crush contestants in an 'iWin A Date' segment on the web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Mrs. Ackerman, the gang's teacher, goes through a rough breakup with her boyfriend, causing her to quarrel with her students. A visit from Spencer to sort out the dispute turns into a date.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iSaw Him First: When Carly and Sam show interest in the same boy, they vow to not let him come between them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iOwe You: Sam is insulted when Freddie accuses her of not paying him and Carly back any of the money she's constantly borrowing.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iHurt Lewbert: A "Messing With Lewbert" sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly's obnoxious doorman.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iPie: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Spencer accidentally sets fire to Carly's presents, she wishes that she had a normal brother. A Christmas angel shows Carly what her life would be like.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iKiss: Sam overhears Freddie confess to Carly that he's never kissed a girl, then exposes his secret on the webshow. Gibby and Carly train Spencer for a tryout with the local professional football team.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iGive Away a Car: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iMeet Fred: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie offend an internet video sensation named Fred, he tries to convince his viewers to never watch iCarly again.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iLook Alike: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they're still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iGo Nuclear: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie get an assignment at school to create an original project that benefits the environment, Carly ends up building an illegal nuclear-powered generator!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie urge the iCarly fans to vote David Archuleta to victory on America Sings, they feel bad for the runner-up and help him make a music video. Meanwhile, Sam teaches Spencer how to lie like a pro.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly's old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly's best friend.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie lose the iCarly URL to Nevel, he demands Carly kiss him if she wants their URL back. Meanwhile, Spencer has fun with the two hundred pillows he accidentally ordered.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam and Freddie both win a contest for the best locker in school, they are forced to share the same locker. Meanwhile, Carly asks Spencer to give her art lessons.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie present iCarly Awards for best user-generated content, giving the awards to the winners live on the web show. Spencer enlists European swimsuit models to help him make the awards statuettes.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie tries to prove that Melanie, Sam's twin sister, is just Sam in disguise. Meanwhile, when Carly tutors Spencer's nemesis, Chuck, Spencer tries to convince her that Chuck is evil.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: 13-year-old Carly Shay and her friends, Sam and Freddie, create a homemade Web show called iCarly. With Freddie behind the camera and Carly and Sam hosting the show, you never know what to expect!

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam, Dice and Goomer go to a mixed-martial arts fight, leaving Cat at home to study; Sam's motorcycle goes missing; Cat loses her memory.
